zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Neville於1397年出生在英國英格蘭達勒姆拉比時，她的父親Ralph Neville34歲，母親Joan de Beaufort22歲。她於1414年10月7日與Henry Percy 2nd Earl of Northumberland在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1472年在她的家鄉享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾貝弗利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Neville于1397年出生在英国英格兰達勒姆拉比时，她的父亲Ralph Neville34岁，母亲Joan de Beaufort22岁。她于1414年10月7日与Henry Percy 2nd Earl of Northumberland在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1472年在她的家乡享年75岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾貝弗利。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Elinor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor .

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Neville was born in 1397, in Raby, Durham, England, United Kingdom, her father, Ralph Neville, was 34 and her mother, Joan de Beaufort, was 22. She married Henry Percy 2nd Earl of Northumberland on 7 October 1414, in Alnwick, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1472, in her hometown, at the age of 75, and was buried in Beverley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Neville est née en 1397, à Raby, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph Neville, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Joan de Beaufort, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Percy 2nd Earl of Northumberland le 7 octobre 1414, à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1472, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Beverley, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Nevilleが1397年にイギリスイギリスダルハムラビーで生まれた時，父Ralph Nevilleは34歳，母Joan de Beaufortは22歳であった。1414年10月7日にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックでHenry Percy 2nd Earl of Northumberlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1472年に故郷で75歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアベバーリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Neville(이)가 1397년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 라비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Neville(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Beaufort(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1414년 10월 7일 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅에서 Henry Percy 2nd Earl of Northumberland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1472년 그녀의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 베벌리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Neville nasceu em 1397, em Raby, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph Neville, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Beaufort, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Percy 2nd Earl of Northumberland em 7 de outubro de 1414, em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1472, em sua cidade natal, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em Beverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Château de Beaufort, Anjou, Maine-et-Loi: анджоу, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Neville родилась в 1397 г. в местности раби, дурам, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Ralph Neville было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Beaufort, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Percy 2nd Earl of Northumberland 7 октября 1414 г. в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1472 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности бивирли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Henry Percy 2nd Earl of Northumberland el 7 de octubre de 1414, en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1472, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en Beverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
